arcs.title: The Duck Bandit Stirs Again
arcs.summary: New arc opening: upon returning from the northeast route, Steve found a single rubber duck on the Jeep's bonnet — still damp, placed with evident deliberateness, facing the same direction as the brass ducks on the shelf. No footprints. The last Duck Bandit appearance was weeks ago, and this duck is a different colour than the previous ones. Day 2 should establish whether the colour is meaningful, whether a second duck appears, and whether the direction it faces is a message or a coincidence — which in Duck Bandit matters has historically been the same thing.
